    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    P

    payFood(int, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Deducts food from the player's reserve.
    payFood(int, int, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Pays food or prestige with a textual reason for logging.
    Player - Class in it.polimi.Game.Elements
    Represents a player in the game and stores their resources, cards, and tile assignments.
    Player(Color) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Constructs a new player with an initial empty state.
    PlayerScore - Class in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    Immutable per-player score snapshot at match end.
    PlayerScore(String, int, int, int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.PlayerScore
    Constructs a PlayerScore snapshot representing a player's final performance.
    playerScores() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.GameResult
    Returns the list of final player scores.
    Position - Enum Class in it.polimi.Constants
    Defines the possible positions of a card or a game element.
    prepareFirstRound() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Builds the initial table layout for the first round.
    prepareOfferTiles() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Loads the available offer tiles and keeps only the ones valid for the current player count.
    prestigePoints() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.PlayerScore
    Returns the prestige points scored.
    propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
    Listens to properties fired by the game model and forwards them to the client callback.
    propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.View.VirtualView
    Invoked automatically when the observed Game model broadcasts a state change.
    PURPLE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.Color
    The purple player color.
